current_thesis_md: Author's current framework (late Mar-early Apr 2026): rotation into photonics/CPO/ELS supply chains as institutions chase multi-year bottlenecks. Core stack: (1) CW laser chokepoints - SIVE, AAOI, MTSI, LITE, COHR + Chinese/TW names; (2) CPO foundries - TSEM, Win Semi (3105.TWO); (3) Substrates/epitaxy - AXTI; (4) Testing - AEHR, FORM; (5) NeoCloud - NBIS/CRWV (not IREN); (6) Energy bottleneck - Hammond HPS.A; (7) Rare earths/critical minerals - USAR, MP, ALM, MSR. Hedged 15% cash. Bearish IREN (dilution), VCX (private NAV premium), NKE (share loss), VELO (ATM).
